blockers: scripts/web_app_nicegui.py not yet created: the NiceGUI app entry point and UI (tasks 1.2 entry-point, 1.3-1.8, 1.10) are not implemented in this slice. The deployment command falls back to scripts/web_app_hub.py until web_app_nicegui.py is created by the NiceGUI implementation group.
summary: Group B infrastructure slice complete. Added nicegui>=2,<3 to the scion-ops-mcp Docker image venv. Updated the kind web-app Deployment command to prefer scripts/web_app_nicegui.py when present and fall back to scripts/web_app_hub.py, preserving existing service/probe/auth/workspace conventions. Updated docs/kind-control-plane.md and README.md to reference the NiceGUI operator console. Marked tasks 1.9 and 1.11 complete; task verify passes clean. Remaining blocker: the NiceGUI app script itself (tasks 1.3-1.8, 1.10) is out of scope for this slice and must be delivered by the NiceGUI implementation group.
tasks_completed: 1.9 Update kind manifests, probes, service wiring, lifecycle tasks, and documentation for the NiceGUI web app while preserving existing runtime configuration conventions.
1.11 Run the repo validation and web app smoke/static checks required by the implementation branch.
1.2 (partial) Add NiceGUI runtime dependency to scion-ops-mcp Docker image venv.
tests_run: task verify (git diff --check, task --list, python syntax checks for all scripts, test-openspec-change-validator, test-steward-session-validator, test-steward-pr-finalizer, test-openspec-archive, test-mcp-openspec-cli, test-mcp-progress-lines, test-mcp-base-branch, test-mcp-implementation-base-branch, test-steward-basic-loop, test-wait-for-review-artifact, test_impl_orchestration, test-web-app-hub, test-verdict-schema, test-final-review-repair, bash -n shell checks)
